divergence: The postal service achieved faster-than-light delivery but only for junk mail
story_angle: solemn obituary for a beloved institution nobody can remember the purpose of
headline: Quoian Bureau of Purposeful Dispatch Laid to Rest: A Solemn Tribute to Irrelevance
deck: In a peculiar twist of fate, the funeral of a defunct institution draws a modest crowd of clerks still lamenting its forgotten purpose.
article:
Beneath the vaulted portico of its shuttered headquarters, the Comte Dispatch LeFacteur conducted last rites for the Quoian Bureau of Purposeful Dispatch. Forty-seven clerks filed past the bier, each clutching the agency’s final, unanswered directive. Three empty mail sacks trailed the casket like forgotten footnotes.

An epitaph cut into black granite read: 'Here Lies Utility, Which Once Distinguished Circular From Calamity.' Mirabelle DeChiffre, ledger-keeper since the Purpose Plague, observed that the grave might belong to significance itself. Meanwhile the living city continued sorting luminous flyers that promised remedies for complaints no one had yet voiced.
author: Céline Monét, Chronicler of the Quoian Bureaucratic Chronicles

weather.condition: Clear skies above the Bureau’s plot, with a chance of neglected correspondence

oped.title: A Fitting End for Purposeful Folly: Long Live the Celestial Circular
oped.author: Sir Thaddeus Waffle, Knight of the Unread Pamphlet and Reluctant Recipient of Actual Letters
oped.body: The Bureau’s modest interment merely ratifies what any sensible reader already knew: once the post mastered faster-than-light delivery, purposeful mail became an expensive affectation. Those stovepipe-hatted mourners have only themselves to blame for imagining that serious letters deserved equal speed. My own weekly disquisitions on literacy’s perils now reach their targets before the recipients have time to object. The remedy is plain—reserve instantaneous transit for unsolicited matter and let named correspondence crawl, thereby sparing gentlemen the nuisance of opening mail addressed to them.

classifieds.text: For Sale: Entire stock of the Quoian Bureau's purposeful dispatch ledgers and mahogany pigeonholes, now quite useless; will trade for a cartload of the latest interstellar circulars.
Help Wanted: Two dozen clerks of steady habit required to staff a new lamentation society for the late Bureau; salary paid in obsolete stamps and the satisfaction of irrelevance.

Public Notice: The Proprietor of the Quoian Bureau hereby confesses that all purposeful correspondence has been interred with the institution; henceforth only bills and advertisements shall enjoy faster-than-light transit.
Personal: Middle-aged clerk of the defunct Bureau seeks like-minded soul to share quiet evenings mourning forgotten purpose; correspondence by junk mail only, directed to the cemetery gates.

panels.caption: Clerk at the open grave: "The Bureau's ledger shows one final entry—'purpose unknown since the FTL flyers arrived.'"
Fellow clerk, clutching a stack of glowing circulars: "We petitioned for purposeful letters, but the postmaster rerouted everything to junk."
First clerk, lowering the coffin: "At least our own obituaries will reach us before the dirt settles."

joke.setup: Mourners assembled to lay the Bureau of Purposeful Dispatch to rest, its FTL capacity having rendered it obsolete.
joke.punchline: The only messages it ever expedited were those offering elixirs for ailments one had not yet the leisure to contract.
joke.text: Mourners assembled to lay the Bureau of Purposeful Dispatch to rest, its FTL capacity having rendered it obsolete. The only messages it ever expedited were those offering elixirs for ailments one had not yet the leisure to contract.

sponsor_ads.headline: The Quoian Bureau's Eternal Rest Assured
sponsor_ads.body: With Purposeful Dispatch interred, gentlemen may now forward their most trifling circulars via our faster-than-light packets, arriving yesterday at every address yet none of consequence.
sponsor_ads.tagline: No useful missive conveyed; irrelevance assured by statute.

sponsor_ads.headline: Aetheric Waste Post: FTL Junk for the Discerning
sponsor_ads.body: Now that the Bureau lies cold, subscribe to our luminous delivery of unsolicited advertisements that outpace all meaningful correspondence by decades.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Contents guaranteed to arrive before posted; utility strictly prohibited.

sponsor_ads.headline: Memorial Pamphlets for the Late Bureau
sponsor_ads.body: Order our FTL-printed elegies to irrelevance, dispatched instantaneously to every household that never requested them.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Printed on paper that predates its own writing; purpose expressly absent.

sponsor_ads.headline: Quoian Bureau Commemorative Speed-Circulars
sponsor_ads.body: Celebrate the demise of purposeful mail with our faster-than-light advertisements for the very notices that rendered the Bureau obsolete.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Delivered before the request; solemnity optional, irrelevance mandatory.

stories.headline: Former Bureau Clerks Petition for New Purpose After Institutional Interment
stories.deck: Queue forms at the Department of Forgotten Mandates for reassignment to obsolete circular tallies
stories.article: Outside the clapboard annex on Rue des Spirales, ex-clerks tendered ledgers that tallied unopened circulars from 1880. A junior functionary accepted the bundles and recorded that no fresh irrelevancies had been scheduled for the coming week.

real_world_echo: Norway memorial for 2011 massacre victims, mirrored as a grand public mourning for an obliterated institution whose original tragedy (the 'purpose plague') is now politely forgotten
